feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Stuck update in sm13
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have been getting these dump along with stuck update in my customers systems.

Category ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR
Except. CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB
ABAP Program SAPLV50U
Application Component LE-SHP
Date and Time 15.04.2024 12:42:49 (CET)

 

Short Text
Open SQL array insert produces duplicate records in the database.

 

What happened?
Error in the ABAP application program.

The current ABAP program "SAPLV50U" had to be terminated because it
statement that could not be executed.

 

What can I do?
Note which actions and entries caused the error to occur.

Consult your SAP administrator.

Using transaction ST22 for ABAP dump analysis, you can view, manage
and retain termination messages for longer periods.
Note which actions and entries caused the error to occur.

Consult your SAP administrator.

Using transaction ST22 for ABAP dump analysis, you can view, manage
and retain termination messages for longer periods.

Error analysis
An exception has occurred in class "CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB". This exception was not
caught
in procedure "LIPS_VERBUCHEN" "(FORM)" or propagated by a RAISING clause.
Since the caller of the procedure could not have anticipated this
exception, the current program was terminated.
The reason for the exception occurring was:
The reason for the exception is:
When an Open SQL array insert is performed, trying to insert a record
into the database table "LIPS" causes the function to terminate if a
record with the same key already exists.

(When an Open SQL individual record insert is performed, this situation
does not cause the function to terminate. SY-SUBRC is set to 4 instead.)

I want to know what is the exact reason for this error and as a basis consultant what i should do. Also some updates have created a dump and some did not what does this mean.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Not authorized to create custom business object ZZ1_YUGYUGUY
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am using S4 hana on premise system qky-910 and I have SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR and SAP_BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC assigned to my user.
Now, when i am trying to create new custom business object I am getting Not authorized to create custom business object ZZ1_YUGYUGUY error.


Please let me know if any additional roles are required for the same.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility  SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Entity missing in OData Service, because of S/4 Version
entry.content:
Hi experts!

we want to use use an API Customer Return (A2X) | SAP Help Portal in our S/4 Hana System. We want to use the Entity "Item Text". The Problem is, that our S/4 Release Version is 2020 and the Entity "Item Text" is only available from Version 2021 on. The company currently doesn't want to upgrade the S/4 Release. Does anyone know a solution to make use of the Entity "Item Text"?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: SAP Subscription Billing, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Clarification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One quick question on the SAP EVENT MESH activation for Subscription Billing and SAP S/4HANA. Do we need to have 1NN business event handling enabled for public cloud or is there any standard out of the box event messaging can be used without having to have additional license for 1NN? @stefan_kiene 

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP Subscription Billing SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management SAP Event Management SAP Event Broker for SAP cloud applications 

Thanks!

entry.title: Overall budget exceeded error VS Annual budget exceeded error
entry.content:
We were just upgraded to S4 on January 1st this year. When we tried to post invoices with SAP function module BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE, sometimes we got the expense exceeded the budget errors. My question is that why sometimes we got the "overall budget exceeded" error and sometimes we got the "annual budget exceeded" errors. What attributes make S4 to check the expense against the overall budget instead of annual budget? Is there a flag in the imported parameters of BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE can make S4 to check the expense against the annual budget instead of overall budget? Thank you in advance for your help!

Fisher Li

entry.title: S4H OnPrem 2022 Initial SP - Assign Handling Unit to Outbound Delivery by BAPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
 
We want to assign HU to outbound delivery by C# .NET Code. We confirmed with SAP experts, there is no API can be used to achieve this requirement in S4HANA 2022.
But they said maybe BAPI can do that.

We found SAP connector for Microsoft .Net allows developers to use BAPIs and remote-enabled function modules in any .NET application.
 
I searched some articles about using BAPI to assign handling unit to outbound delivery.
One article says BAPI BAPI_HU_CHANGE_HEADER can do that, I use the article as reference, but it still failed to assign the HU to outbound delivery.
 
Can anyone give me some idea whether BAPI_HU_CHANGE_HEADER be used to assign HU to outbound delivery? If yes, can you provide some sample codes or documents for me?

If no, any other BAPIs can be used to do that?
 
Below is the link for the article.
https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/delivery-and-shipment-handling-units/ba-p/13336462
 
Thanks

entry.title: How to bring tasks from multiple backends(CRM/ECC) to fiori inbox
entry.content:
Hi 

we are migrating from ECC to S/4 HANA on-premise edition.  we need to bring tasks from multiple backends (CRM/ECC) into fiori my inbox.  So user can access both tasks from one point.

2486885 - My Inbox error "Resource not found for the segment 'TaskCollection'"

If you are running S/4HANA 2020 or above in an embedded deployment, remember  to make sure that service TASKPROCESSING points only to LOCAL_TGW system alias

Any documentation available to configure the above scenario.

Thanks

Shankar

entry.title: How to extend CNSETTLRULE to include COPA Fields?
entry.content:
CNSETTLERULE report doesn't have COPA characteristics fields. How to extend CNSETTLERULE report to display the below listed fields:

Table: CE4GM00_ACCT / CE4GM00

Unit of Measure
Trading Partner
Sold-to Country
Producing Plant
Product Type
Product Line
Other
Sales Program
Country of Origin


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BP Transaction : Collection contact person is not getting created
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am creating contact person in BP transaction through BAPI with the below parameters.

 call function 'BAPI_BUPR_CONTP_CREATE'
      exporting
        businesspartner     = lv_kunnr
        contactperson       = rv_partner
        defaultrelationship = ' '
      tables
        addressduplicates   = lt_addressduplicates
        return              = lt_bapiret2_tab.

 

It's creating the contact person successfully which I can see under "Has contact person tab"(Please refer the attached screenshot)

But When I checked "Has collection contact person" I can see there is no entry there as expectation is to create collection contact person details as well.

I have already tried with the above BAPI with some additional parameters but no success yet.

I also tried with a new BAPI with the below parameters but even after success message. Collection contact person is not getting created.

data : lt_result            type table of bapiret2.
  call function 'BUPR_RELATIONSHIP_CREATE'
    exporting
      iv_partner_1    = lv_kunnr
      iv_partner_2    = rv_partner
      iv_relationship = 'UDM001'
      iv_x_save       = space
    tables
      et_return       = lt_result.
*  endif..

Please let me know if you have come through this scenario or have any information about this topic.

 

Regards,

Om

entry.title: How to achieve multiple default values in Fiori list page by using @Odata.publish annotation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to show multiple default values (5 entries) of Supplier Account Group (LFA1-KTOKK) in selection parameter of FLP. But getting error as "Binding target not unique: SUPPLIERACCOUNTGROUP [Odata exposure]". 

I have activated the odata service with annotation @Odata.publish:true where all of my other features are working as expected but not able to achieve this. Can't we populate multiple default values with Odata service option ? Please help. 

I have tried the below code for Vendor Account group column in my CDS:

@Consumption.filter: {selectionType: #SINGLE, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: true}

@Consumption.derivation:{ lookupEntity: 'I_SUPPLIERACCOUNTGROUP',

resultElement: 'SupplierAccountGroup',

binding: [{targetElement:'SupplierAccountGroup', type: #CONSTANT, value: 'ZSUP' },

{ targetElement:'SupplierAccountGroup', type: #CONSTANT, value: 'ZPUR' },

{ targetElement:'SupplierAccountGroup', type: #CONSTANT, value: 'ZFRT' },

{ targetElement:'SupplierAccountGroup', type: #CONSTANT, value: 'ZEXP' },

{ targetElement:'SupplierAccountGroup', type: #CONSTANT, value: 'ZLOC' }]}

@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_ZISUP'

 

 

@ui.selectionField: [{ position: 10 }]

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity:{name: 'Zcst_Dat_Accgrptext_Vh',element: 'SupplierAccountGroup' } }]

ktokk as Vendoraccountgroup,


SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics OData

entry.title: Custom extraction enabled CDS views in S/4HANA 2023 on premise
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, Happy Friday,

We are implementing on premise S/4 HANA 2023: See system config attached.

As we have some 3rd party applications in S/4 Development System, there is also the need to build custom extractors for e.g. load to existing BW/4 and we planned to use extraction enabled CDS views in S/4:

  • We only find online documentation to implement custom extraction enabled CDS based on defineView
  • As we see from latest developments, defineView is not the state-of-the-art solution and will become obsolete as by AS ABAP 7.57, see attachments.
  • Is there any future proofed way to build in S/4 HANA 2023 (on premise) custom extraction enabled CDS views (using defineViewEntity or similar)?  

Thanks a lot for your feedbacks, links and material upfront!

Best regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Not able to locate sap:updatable or sap:creatable tags in metadata for SAP S/4HANA OData V4 APIs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

For any OData V4 APIs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud or On-premise, when we query for the $metadata for any service, we do not find these tags anymore: sap:creatable, sap:updatable, sap:delectable, etc to know if each entityset or field/property within an entity is supported for these operations or not.

Have we changed the mechanism to check this information on the compatibility? 

Would be really helpful if someone in SAP S/4HANA product team can help us in answering this question since we are unable to know that which all fields supports what all operations within an entity by looking at the metadata which was pretty much clear in OData V2 APIs. @SAPSupport 

Regards,

Sidhant Mahajan

entry.title: Purchasing Condition Contract
entry.content:
Business is looking for settlement in condition contract in purchasing for manufacturer price and distributor price also. Please advise


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S_ALR_87013611 Report Painter report to Internal Table
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

  Im trying to run the standard report s_alr_87013611 in my abap program using submit to get the data in an internal table, but as a result the report is executed and data not returned. 

kindly review the attached code and suggest solutions

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report ZZ_COSTCENTER_3611
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT ZZ_COSTCENTER_3611.

TABLES: CSKS, CSKA.

**SALV[
***********************************************************************
**   Global References for Classes                                    **
************************************************************************
 DATA: gr_table     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
 DATA: gr_functions TYPE REF TO cl_salv_functions_list.
* DATA: gr_functions TYPE REF TO cl_salv_functions.
 DATA: gr_display   TYPE REF TO cl_salv_display_settings.
 DATA: gr_columns   TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns_table.
 DATA: gr_column    TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column_table.
 DATA: gr_sorts     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_sorts.
 DATA: gr_agg       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_aggregations.
 DATA: gr_layout    TYPE REF TO cl_salv_layout.
 DATA: r_events TYPE REF TO cl_salv_events_table.
 DATA: rs_selfield TYPE slis_selfield.
 DATA: r_ucomm LIKE sy-ucomm.
 DATA: oref TYPE REF TO cx_root,
       text TYPE string.

************************************************************************
**   Data Declarations                                                **
************************************************************************
 DATA: it_spfli TYPE TABLE OF spfli.
 DATA: lv_key   TYPE salv_s_layout_key.

**get_layout[
 DATA:set_lay   TYPE slis_vari,
     g_exit    TYPE c,
     g_variant TYPE disvariant.
**get_layout]
**SALV]

** define data for SUBMIT Return
DATA: go_data TYPE REF TO data.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS: <gt_data> TYPE ANY TABLE.

SELECTION-SCREEN begin of BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME title text-000.  "Selection Values

*select-OPTIONS: s_ebeln for ekko-ebeln.
  PARAMETERS: pKOKRS TYPE KOKRS OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '1000',  "Company Code
            pGJAHR TYPE GJAHR OBLIGATORY ,                   " Fiscal Year
            pPERBL_F TYPE PERBL,                             " period low
            pPERBL_T TYPE PERBL,                           "period high
            pVERSN TYPE VERSN OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '0'.      "plan version

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.


SELECTION-SCREEN begin of BLOCK B2 WITH FRAME title text-001.   "Selection Group

PARAMETERS: pKSGRU TYPE KSGRU. "cost center Group
PARAMETERS: p_KOSTL TYPE CSKS-KOSTL NO-DISPLAY.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: so_kostl FOR p_kostl.

PARAMETERS: pKAGRU TYPE KAGRU  "Cost element group
               .

PARAMETERS: p_kstar TYPE CSKA-KSTAR NO-DISPLAY.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: so_kstar for p_kstar.

SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK B2.

START-OF-SELECTION.

      "Set SALV grid output parameters so the report executed in background
   cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>set( EXPORTING display  = abap_false
                                        metadata = abap_false
                                        data     = abap_true ).

    SUBMIT GP4QLQKH46VZJ3P1A40A23S3HJG300
*      EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY
          WITH $1KOKRE EQ pkokrs
          WITH $1GJAHR EQ pgjahr
          WITH $1PERIV EQ pperbl_f
          WITH $1PERIB EQ pperbl_t
          WITH $1VERP EQ pversn
          WITH $1KOSET EQ pksgru
          WITH _1KOSET IN so_kostl
          WITH $1KSTAR EQ pKAGRU
          WITH _1KSTAR IN so_kstar
    AND RETURN
    .
"Get data from s_alr_87013611
  TRY.
      cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref(
        IMPORTING r_data = go_data ).
      ASSIGN go_data->* TO <gt_data>.

      "Keep FBL1N data into internal table
*      IF <gt_data> IS ASSIGNED.
*        LOOP AT <gt_data> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_data>).
*          MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_data> TO WA_FBL3N.
*          WA_FBL3N-source = 'FBL3N'.
*          APPEND WA_FBL3N TO IT_FBL3N.
*        ENDLOOP.
*      ENDIF.

    CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info ##NO_HANDLER.
      MESSAGE 'Unable to retrieve ALV data' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDTRY.

entry.title: Method to automate Change of Storage location in Process order
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Please guide me how to automate the process of Changing of Storage location in Process order after certain bussines transaction.

Primarliy this to change the reservation from the Store sloc to Shopfloor Sloc.

I beilve LSMW and BDC will not be good idea.

Please help SAP S/4HANA Industrial Manufacturing

entry.title: Insights on SAP vs Oracle
entry.content:
I'm working on a new project for a large corporation (manufacturing and distribution) to evaluate potential ERP solutions. I’m new to this topic and I was asked by my manager to help get it started.

I've been looking at all sorts of research and I'm eager to gain real-world perspectives from experienced professionals in the field.

Specifically, I'm interested in your insights on SAP and Oracle:

  • What are the advantages and disadvantages encountered with SAP and Oracle in large-scale deployments? 
  • Are there particular functionalities where one performs better over the other?
  • Cost is a major factor. Can anyone share experiences regarding implementation timelines and ongoing maintenance expenses for both?

What other questions should I be asking? 

Thanks in advance for sharing your valuable knowledge!

Noa

entry.title: EHS Data Migration for SAP S/4hana on-premise
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to migrate the data of the EHS module in the S/4hana on-premise system using the staging table method—data such as chemical substance, risk, control, and compliance requirements for OEL. There is no standard template for these data in the Migration Cockpit app. I would be grateful if anyone has a solution for this problem.

Regards

entry.title: expiration date - open coli
entry.content:
For specific raw materials there is an expiration date in the system, which reflects the expiration date for a coli which have not been opened. When the coli has been opened the expiration date is reduced. So in a planning scenario it will be difficult to estimate how much to purchase, which depends on if the open coli can be used in process orders before it expire.

How to control this in SAP?

Br. sune

entry.title: Loading End and Departure message identifier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

This has reference to our production environment (PEW) where incoming Loading End and Departure messages for FO is coming almost at the same time from EWM-->TM.

Loading End was reported at 10:12:39 and Departure was reported at 10:12:50.

Can you please help us to know if there exists an identifier using which we would be able to differentiate a Loading End message with Departure message.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Stock Room Management and SAP TM in S/4HANA
entry.content: Dear all, an Integration between SAP LE-TRA and Stock Room Management is possible in my eyes at the moment in S/4HANA. But after 2030 when SAP stop the support of LE-TRA, then there is not integration anymore with Stock Room Managment. What should the client do? Is an integration between SAP TM and Stock Room Management in S/4HANA possible? If yes, how is this possible between both Systems?
